apply: Apply knowledge of plant growth and development to explain the growth patterns of different plant species.
Use the concept of plant growth and development to explain the effects of environmental factors on plant growth.
Design an experiment to investigate the role of a specific hormone in plant growth and development.
analyze: Analyze the effects of different environmental factors on plant growth and development.
Compare and contrast the growth patterns of different plant species.
Evaluate the role of hormones in regulating plant growth and development.
remember: Describe the major stages of plant growth and development.
List the key factors influencing plant growth and development.
Explain the role of hormones in plant growth and development.
understand: Explain the concept of cell elongation and cell division in plant growth and development.
Describe the process of differentiation and maturation in plant development.
Discuss the role of environmental factors on plant growth and development.

ncert_objectives: Explain the major stages of plant growth and development.
Describe the role of hormones in plant growth and development.
Discuss the factors influencing plant growth and development.
board_exam_objectives: Describe the major stages of plant growth and development.
Explain the role of hormones in plant growth and development.
Discuss the factors influencing plant growth and development.
